subject: Re: ts_import selection criteria got nothing.
body:
Hi Shanmukha,

two possibilities
- your tilts got deactivated at some point in earlier processing, see
https://warpem.github.io/warp/reference/warptools/api/general/#change_selection
for
how to fix
- the filenames in your mdocs don't match the names of your eer files

Good luck!

Cheers,

Alister

On Tue, 3 Jun 2025 at 13:54, 'Shanmukha Vamshi Kuruba' via Warp <
warp-em@googlegroups.com> wrote:

> I'm trying to reconstruct a tomogram for tilt series from .eer files. When
> I run the following command, It doesn't generate a .tomostar file. I have
> checked the max tilt angle and  masker fraction and they are well within
> the limits.
>
> Any Idea what could be causing the problem? I would appreciate any help.
>
> Here is the Output:
>
> Running command ts_import with:
> mdocs = frames/
> pattern = *.mdoc
> frameseries = warp_frameseries
> tilt_exposure = 3.46
> dont_invert = True
> override_axis = null
> auto_zero = False
> tilt_offset = null
> max_tilt = 90
> min_intensity = 0
> max_mask = 1
> min_ntilts = 1
> output = tomostar
>
> Found 34 MDOC files, searching for *.mdoc in
> /data/Shan/tomo_reconstruct/frames/
> Looking for frame series...
> 34/34
>
